_description: AI Elementor Design System Framework — Consistent rules for generating professional templates
_style_inspiration: StudyIn (gostudyin.com) — Bold punchy headlines, generous white space, accent color shapes/blobs behind images, trust bars, list-style destination sections, large quotation marks on testimonials, modern minimal card designs, colored section blocks. Our color theme: Navy (#0B1D3A) / Gold (#C49A3C) / Teal (#2AADBD) from the Infinite Global Recruitment logo.

structure._note: ALWAYS use container-based (modern) layout. NEVER use section/column (legacy).

full_width_section._description: Top-level page section — full viewport width, vertical stacking

boxed_content._description: Inner container capping content at max-width for readability

row_layout._description: Horizontal row for side-by-side elements (cards, columns)

card._description: Card component with shadow, border-radius, and padding

nesting_rules: Top-level: container (full_width_section) — one per logical page section
Level 2: container (boxed_content) — caps width inside the full-width section
Level 3: container (row_layout) — horizontal layout for multi-column content
Level 4: container (card) or widget — final content elements
Every widget must be inside a container, never directly at top level

spacing._note: Based on 8-point grid. All spacing values must be multiples of 8.

typography._note: StudyIn-inspired bold typography. Larger display/H1 sizes for impact. All headings use Montserrat (bold/extrabold), body uses Open Sans.

colors._note: Semantic color tokens. Every template should define these. Avoid hardcoded hex — reference these tokens.
contrast_rules: Text on dark bg: minimum #B0BEC5 (4.7:1 contrast ratio)
Text on light bg: minimum #6B7280 for secondary, #1A1A2E for primary
Buttons: primary color bg with white text
Never use pure black (#000000) for text — use #1A1A2E instead
Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for bg text areas with lots of content — use #F8F9FF

components._note: Reusable component patterns with consistent settings

section_heading._description: Standard section heading with overline + title + subtitle

animation._note: Consistent entrance animations. Keep subtle — avoid flashy effects.
rules: Use fadeInUp as the DEFAULT entrance animation for all content
Stagger delays by 100-200ms between sibling elements
Use fadeInLeft/fadeInRight ONLY for split-layout columns
Duration: always 'normal' (400ms) — never 'slow' for loading content
Hero section heading: fadeInUp with 0ms delay
Hero CTA buttons: fadeInUp with 400ms delay
Cards in a row: all fadeInUp, stagger 100ms each (0, 100, 200, 300...)
NEVER animate backgrounds or containers — only content widgets
ALWAYS set _tablet and _mobile font sizes for h1, h2, display headings
Container flex_direction: row on desktop → column on tablet/mobile
Section padding: reduce by ~40% on mobile
Card grid: 3 columns desktop → 2 tablet → 1 mobile (use flex_wrap + width %)
Hide decorative elements on mobile using _element_visibility

html_content_rules: NEVER use inline style= attributes with double quotes — they create backslash issues in JSON
Use Elementor native controls (title_color, typography_*) instead of inline CSS whenever possible
For badge/pill labels, use a heading widget with custom typography + background color instead of HTML
If HTML is unavoidable, use single quotes for attributes: style='color: red'
Prefer Elementor widgets over raw HTML at all times
Use text-editor widget only for simple paragraph text, not for complex styled elements

section_patterns._note: StudyIn-inspired section layouts — bold, spacious, modern
section_patterns.hero: Full-width container (dark navy bg) → boxed inner → row(2 cols: text left 55% + image right 45% with colored accent shape behind). Trust bar below: 4 inline stat badges.
section_patterns.trust_bar: Full-width container (white/light bg, compact padding) → boxed inner → row(4 stat items inline: icon/number + label). Shows credibility immediately below hero.
section_patterns.two_pathway_cards: Full-width container → boxed inner → heading + row(2 large cards, 48% each, with icon + title + text + CTA button, subtle shadow, rounded corners 16px)
section_patterns.stats_bar: Full-width container (dark bg) → boxed inner → row(4 counter widgets, gold number color, white labels)
section_patterns.services_grid: Full-width container → boxed inner → heading group + row(3 or 6 cards, clean minimal icons, generous padding 40px inside cards)
section_patterns.split_content: Full-width container → boxed inner → row(2 cols: image 45% with accent color blob/shape behind + text 50% with heading + bullets/paragraphs)
section_patterns.destination_list: Full-width container → boxed inner → row(text left 40% + destination list right 55%). Each destination is a full-width clickable row with country name, arrow icon, separated by subtle borders. StudyIn-style clean list layout.
section_patterns.testimonials: Full-width container (colored bg — light teal or gold tint) → boxed inner → large quotation mark SVG decorative + single testimonial card with quote, name, program. Or 3-card grid with star ratings.
section_patterns.expert_counsellor: Full-width container → boxed inner → row(2 cols: colored block with heading left + quote card with photo right). Accent color background blocks.
section_patterns.cta_banner: Full-width container (dark navy bg with optional gold accent shape) → boxed inner (narrow 900px) → bold centered heading + subtext + prominent CTA button (gold)
section_patterns.footer: Full-width container (very dark navy bg) → boxed inner → logo + tagline row + row(4 cols: about/social, destinations, quick links, contact) + bottom bar(copyright + legal links)
section_patterns.faq: Full-width container → boxed inner → row(heading left 35% + FAQ list right 60%). Clean accordion with plus/minus icons.
section_patterns.partner_logos: Full-width container (light bg, compact padding) → boxed inner → heading (counter number + text) + row of logo images

quality_checklist: All sections have consistent padding from spacing.section_padding
All text has responsive font sizes (_tablet, _mobile)
No inline style= with double quotes in HTML
Section backgrounds alternate between light/dark for visual rhythm
Maximum content width capped at 1200px via boxed container
All heading hierarchies correct (h1 once, h2 per section, h3 for subsections)
Color contrast meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for large text)
